item.normal.name: Zebrus Quest Board
item.gold.name: Zebrus Gold Quest Board
item.iridium.name: Zebrus Iridium Quest Board
item.modboard.name: Zebrus Mod Quest Board
item.gold.description: A smart board: Displays special orders and daily quests.
item.iridium.description: A quest terminal: Displays tasks from Mr. Qi. Access to special orders and daily quests.
item.modboard.description: A special quest board for quests from other regions (e.g., Ridgeside Village).
mail.robin.text: Hello @,^I've seen you do a lot for the community!^I drafted a blueprint for an improved quest board. It lets you check special orders directly from home.^It needs some gold for the antenna though!^^   - Robin %item craftingRecipe Zebrus_Gold_Quest_Board %%
mail.qi.text: Congratulations. You have found things hidden to others.^I have been watching your talent for a long time.^Here is a blueprint to help you work even more efficiently. Do not disappoint me.^^   - Mr. Qi %item craftingRecipe Zebrus_Iridium_Quest_Board %%
mail.raccoon.text: Hello neighbor!^I saw you took care of that old stump. That inspired me!^Here is a little blueprint for a statue that helps you keep an eye on the furry residents.^^   - A friend %item craftingRecipe Zebrus_Raccoon_Statue %%
mail.fish.text: Ahoy!^Congratulations on your new Fish Pond! Fish can be demanding creatures.^To save you from checking on them every day, I designed this sensor. Good luck!^^   - Willy %item craftingRecipe Zebrus_Fish_Statue %%
config.gold.name: Enable Gold Board
config.gold.tooltip: Unlocks the Gold Board and Robin's letter.
config.iridium.name: Enable Iridium Board
config.iridium.tooltip: Unlocks the Iridium Board and Mr. Qi's letter.
config.modboard.name: Enable Mod Board
config.modboard.tooltip: Unlocks the special quest board for quests from other mods (e.g., Ridgeside Village).
config.raccoon.name: Enable Raccoon Statue
config.raccoon.tooltip: Shows when the raccoon wants a bundle.
config.fish.name: Enable Fish Pond Statue
config.fish.tooltip: Shows when fish ponds need items.
config.ghostcleanup.name: Clean Up Ghost Quests
config.ghostcleanup.tooltip: Removes bugged special orders left by uninstalled mods. Disabled by default for safety.
item.raccoon.name: Raccoon Statue
item.raccoon.description: A small stone raccoon. It signals when the real raccoon is hungry.
item.fishstatue.name: Fish Statue
item.fishstatue.description: A statue honoring the fish. It signals when a Fish Pond needs attention.
hud.raccoon: The raccoon is looking for something!
hud.fishing: A fishing tournament is taking place today!
hud.pond: A fish pond needs your attention!
config.section_graphics.name: Alternative Graphics

config.nl_raccoon.name: Notbelovely: Raccoon Statue

config.nl_fish.name: Notbelovely: Fish Statue
config.nl_fish.tooltip: Enables the alternative texture by 'notbelovely' for the fish pond statue.
config.nl_icons.name: Notbelovely: Quest Icons
config.nl_icons.tooltip: Enables the alternative textures by 'notbelovely' for the floating exclamation marks (quest icons).
config.nl_fishicon.name: Notbelovely: Fishing Tournament Icon
config.nl_fishicon.tooltip: Enables the alternative icon by 'notbelovely' for the fishing tournament.
